info.name: BrewDeck API
info.description: Postman collection for the BrewDeck Spring Boot REST API. Uses Long ID variables and paginated endpoints aligned with the current backend.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Self-registration, JWT login, and current-user endpoints. Register/login are unauthenticated; login and register save the returned token into the authToken collection variable so protected requests inherit it via collection-level Bearer auth.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Mezcla Veracruz",
  "brand": "Café local",

  "sweetnessScore": 5,

item.name: Brew Method
item.description: Brew method CRUD endpoints. The database is also seeded with common methods through Flyway.

item.name: Recipe
item.description: Recipe CRUD, filters, favorites, and lookup endpoints.

body.raw:
{
  "coffeeId": "{{coffeeId}}",
  "methodId": "{{methodId}}",
  "name": "Mezcla Veracruz AeroPress",
  "coffeeGrams": 15,
  "waterGrams": 230,
  "ratio": "1:15",
  "grindSetting": "Timemore S3 - 5.5",
  "waterTemp": 90,
  "brewTime": "2:30",
  "steps": "Bloom 30s, stir gently, press slowly.",
  "expectedTaste": "Clean, aromatic, spicy, balanced.",
  "favorite": false
}

exec: pm.test('Status is 200 (AI enabled) or 503 (AI disabled)', function () {

item.name: GET - Get public recipe by token
Brew Session
item.description: Brew session CRUD, filters, and recipe history endpoints.

item.name: GET - Brew sessions by recipe ID

body.raw:
{
  "recipeId": "{{recipeId}}",
  "actualGrind": "Timemore S3 - 5.5",
  "actualTemp": 90,
  "actualTime": "2:30",
  "tasteResult": "Balanced, clean and aromatic. Cardamom and cinnamon notes were noticeable.",
  "rating": 9,
  "adjustmentNotes": "Repeat same recipe next time."
}
